mapper.select: SELECT g.menu_grp_id, g.store_id, g.menu_grp_name, g.use_yn, g.menu_grp_position, g.created_at, m.menu_id, m.menu_grp_id, m.menu_name, m.price, m.description, m.image_url, m.is_available, m.use_yn, m.display_order FROM menu_grp g LEFT JOIN menus m ON g.menu_grp_id = m.menu_grp_id AND m.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE g.store_id = #{storeId} AND g.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY g.menu_grp_position ASC, m.display_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus ( menu_id, store_id, menu_grp_id, menu_name, price, description, image_url, is_available, use_yn, display_order ) VALUES ( #{menuId}, #{storeId}, #{menuGrpId}, #{menuName}, #{price}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{isAvailable}, #{useYn}, #{displayOrder} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE menu_grp_id = VALUES(menu_grp_id), menu_name = VALUES(menu_name), price = VALUES(price), description = VALUES(description), image_url = VALUES(image_url), is_available = VALUES(is_available), use_yn = VALUES(use_yn), display_order = VALUES(display_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET is_available = #{isAvailable}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
UPDATE menus SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
